task_completion.description: Log in to the application using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo login screen with username 'admin' entered, followed by successful access to the Odoo Calendar application.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'Team Standup' meeting scheduled for next Monday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the calendar view with the 'Team Standup' event clicked, opening the event details or edit modal.

task_completion.description: Enable the recurrence setting for the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the event edit form with the 'Recurrent' checkbox checked, revealing the recurrence configuration options.

task_completion.description: Configure the recurrence to repeat weekly on Mondays and Thursdays.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the recurrence pattern set to 'Weekly' (or Repeat Every 1 Weeks), with the specific day checkboxes for 'Mon' (Monday) and 'Thu' (Thursday) selected.

task_completion.description: Configure the recurrence to end after exactly 10 occurrences and save.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the recurrence ending condition set to 'Number of repetitions' (or similar count-based end type) with the value '10' entered, followed by saving the event.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Odoo web interface. There should be no terminal windows, curl commands, or python scripts used to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo calendar application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches standard Odoo styling and calendar views, rather than a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No 'Inspect Element' or browser developer console is open to modify the DOM text to falsely show the recurrence settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is Odoo. The specific event to modify is named 'Team Standup'. The required recurrence settings are: rrule_type = 'weekly', days = 'mon' and 'thu' (Mondays and Thursdays), end_type = 'count' (Number of repetitions), and count = 10. Verify these exact values are selected in the Odoo event edit form.
